THEVALKYRIE-BLEED_POWER.title: Bleed
THEVALKYRIE-BLEED_POWER.description: Bleeding creatures lose HP every time Bleed is applied. Each turn, Bleed is reduced by 1.
THEVALKYRIE-BLEED_POWER.smartDescription: Next time Bleed is applied, this creature will take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage, plus the new amount. Lowers by 1 each turn.
THEVALKYRIE-OVEREXERTION_POWER.title: Overexertion
THEVALKYRIE-OVEREXERTION_POWER.descripti: Overexertion deals damage to you if you fail to block all damage this turn.
THEVALKYRIE-OVEREXERTION_POWER.smartDesc: Next time you take damage this turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP. Lose this status at turn end.
THEVALKYRIE-ARMOR_POWER.title: Armor
THEVALKYRIE-ARMOR_POWER.description: [gold]Armor[/gold] lowers damage taken from all attacks, before Block.
THEVALKYRIE-TEMPORARY_ARMOR_POWER.title: Temporary Armor
THEVALKYRIE-TEMPORARY_ARMOR_POWER.descri: [gold]Armor[/gold] lowers damage taken from all attacks, before Block.
THEVALKYRIE-TEMPORARY_ARMOR_POWER.smartD: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Armor[/gold] until the end of this turn.
THEVALKYRIE-BURN_BRIGHT_POWER.title: Burning Brightly
THEVALKYRIE-BURN_BRIGHT_POWER.descriptio: Gain Energy at the start of each turn.
THEVALKYRIE-BURN_BRIGHT_POWER.smartDescr: Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
THEVALKYRIE-DEEPEST_CUTS_POWER.title: Deepest Cuts
THEVALKYRIE-DEEPEST_CUTS_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you apply [gold]Bleed[/gold], apply an additional [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Bleed[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-BALANCED_STRIKE_POWER.title: Balanced Advance
THEVALKYRIE-BALANCED_STRIKE_POWER.smartD: Do not [gold]Overexert[/gold] {Amount:plural:this turn|for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.
THEVALKYRIE-CRUSADE_POWER.title: Crusade
THEVALKYRIE-CRUSADE_POWER.description: Your [gold]Smites[/gold] grant extra [gold]Block[/gold] and deal additional damage.
THEVALKYRIE-CRUSADE_POWER.smartDescripti: Your [gold]Smites[/gold] grant [blue]{Amount}[/blue] extra [gold]Block[/gold] and deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.
THEVALKYRIE-INQUISITION_ENCHANT_POWER.sm: Your [gold]Smites[/gold] are created [purple]Enchanted[/purple]. Your already [purple]Enchanted[/purple] Smites are stronger by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
THEVALKYRIE-CHURCH_HYMN_POWER.title: Church Hymn
THEVALKYRIE-CHURCH_HYMN_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Smite[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Overexert[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
THEVALKYRIE-CHURCH_HYMN_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of your turn, add {Amount:plural:a [gold]Smite[/gold]|[blue]{}[/blue] [gold]Smites[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Overexert[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] for each.
THEVALKYRIE-EXSANGUINATING_FORCE_POWER.d: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Bleed[/gold] to all enemies.
THEVALKYRIE-EXSANGUINATING_FORCE_POWER.s: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Bleed[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] to all enemies.
THEVALKYRIE-RAZOR_WINGS_POWER.title: Razor Wings
THEVALKYRIE-RAZOR_WINGS_POWER.descriptio: When hit by an attack, apply [gold]Bleed[/gold] to the attacker.
THEVALKYRIE-RAZOR_WINGS_POWER.smartDescr: When hit by an attack, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Bleed[/gold] back.
THEVALKYRIE-SPIKED_PAULDRONS_POWER.title: Spiked Pauldrons
THEVALKYRIE-ANGEL_FORM_POWER.title: Angel Form
THEVALKYRIE-ANGEL_FORM_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Armor[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-ANGEL_FORM_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Armor[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-PULL_A_MUSCLE_POWER.title: Muscle Pulled
THEVALKYRIE-PULL_A_MUSCLE_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, [gold]Overexert[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-PULL_A_MUSCLE_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, [gold]Overexert[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
THEVALKYRIE-WRITTEN_IN_BLOOD_POWER.title: Inspiration Forming
THEVALKYRIE-WRITTEN_IN_BLOOD_POWER.descr: If you win this fight without taking damage, permanently [gold]Bless[/gold] a card in your deck.
THEVALKYRIE-WRITTEN_IN_BLOOD_POWER.smart: If you win this fight without taking damage, permanently [gold]Bless[/gold] a card in your deck.
THEVALKYRIE-SECOND_WIND_POWER.title: Second Wind
THEVALKYRIE-SECOND_WIND_POWER.descriptio: At the end of your turn, lose some [gold]Overexhaustion[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-SECOND_WIND_POWER.smartDescr: At the end of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Overexhaustion[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-TERRITORIAL_PURPOSE_POWER.de: At the end of your turn, lose some [gold]Overexhaustion[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-TERRITORIAL_PURPOSE_POWER.sm:
At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Byrd Card[/gold] to your hand.
Gain 1 [gold]Byrd Strength[/gold] at the end of the turn.
THEVALKYRIE-BYRD_STRENGTH_POWER.title: Byrd Strength
